name: ganttSchedule
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (server/domains/construction.js, registerLensAction('construction','ganttSchedule',...)) — reached only via /api/lens/run on key 'construction.ganttSchedule' (3-arg handler; reads tasks from calcData(artifact).tasks OR params.tasks). DETERMINISTIC: runs the same CPM forward/backward pass as criticalPath, then maps to bars with startDay/endDay/startDate/endDate (Date arithmetic off startDate || now). Empty/absent/non-array tasks → { bars: [], message } (degrade graceful). A bad startDate yields Invalid-Date strings but never throws (whole body try/catch → {ok:false} on hard error). The GC-bench panel double-wraps; calcData() peels the layer so it computes identically. NOT macro-assassin-driven (LENS_ACTIONS, not MACROS); authored spec pinned by server/tests/construction-domain-parity.test.js + server/tests/construction-lens-macros.test.js.
